items.parityClaim: Equivalent to an accounting manager overseeing multi-LOB close.
items.competencyFrameworkRef: AICPA CGMA Competency Framework — Reporting & Control

items.parityClaim: Equivalent to manager applying written policy.
items.competencyFrameworkRef: AICPA CGMA Competency Framework — Reporting & Control

items.parityClaim: Equivalent to an audit manager helper coordinating the engagement; human manager still decides.
Equivalent to a CFO helper drafting an election memo; the human CFO/controller attests.
Equivalent to a finance analyst preparing CFO read-outs; the human CFO still decides.
Equivalent to a controller helper assembling the routine package; the human controller still signs.
items.competencyFrameworkRef: AICPA CGMA Competency Framework — Reporting & Control

items.parityClaim: Equivalent to a senior staff drafting policy memos for the controller; the human controller still approves.
Equivalent to a senior preparing partner-level drafts; the human partner signs.
Equivalent to a senior posting recurring estimates within documented tolerances.
items.competencyFrameworkRef: AICPA CGMA Competency Framework — Reporting & Control

items.parityClaim: Equivalent to a senior accountant running close under a controller's review.
items.competencyFrameworkRef: AICPA CGMA Competency Framework — Reporting & Control

items.parityClaim: Equivalent to a senior preparing variance commentary for controller review.
Equivalent to a senior auditor reviewing staff work.
Equivalent to staff AP coding under a controller-defined matrix.
items.competencyFrameworkRef: AICPA CGMA Competency Framework — Reporting & Control

items.parityClaim: Matches the workload of a human staff accountant performing routine recurring reconciliations under a senior's review.
items.competencyFrameworkRef: AICPA CGMA Competency Framework — Reporting & Control

items.parityClaim: Equivalent to a staff accountant posting standard recurring entries that do not require judgment.
items.competencyFrameworkRef: AICPA CGMA Competency Framework — Reporting & Control

items.parityClaim: Equivalent to a staff auditor running scripted test steps.
